top_signals.title: Russia launches massive deadly strikes on Ukraine
top_signals.summary: Overnight bombardment on Kyiv and other cities is third large-scale attack in past month
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Google’s $80bn equity raise adds to that giant AI sucking sound
top_signals.summary: Search engine’s move is a good example of how artificial intelligence has made big numbers all but meaningless
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says Jensen Huang’s Computex keynote revealed more winners in the AI boom
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s Computex keynote showed the AI infrastructure boom is creating winners well beyond Nvidia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK has ‘lost control’ of its international narrative, says Barclays
top_signals.summary: Barclays has laid bare the investment barriers facing the UK in a new report that states the nation has “lost control of its international narrative” leading to an impact on foreign capital. The banking giant has called for a drastic shake-up of how the UK attracts international capital, following its share narrowing to seven per [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Clients pay for expertise, not process’ – Grant Thornton rolls out Anthropic AI
top_signals.summary: Professional services giant Grant Thornton is rolling out Anthropic across its entire UK workforce as the firm seeks to embed AI in its services at a time when the technology is upending the industry. The accountancy firm’s UK arm said it will roll out Anthropic’s generative AI service, Claude, to all partners across its audit, [...]
